name: Four Cheese, Pasta and Beef
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Penne or other tube pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions; drain.
2. In a skillet, brown the meat over medium heat until cooked through. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Add the stewed tomatoes to the skillet and cook uncovered for about 5 minutes, or until slightly thickened.
4. Stir in the sliced green onions and cream cheese into the tomato mixture.
5. Toss the pasta with the remaining ingredients (shredded cheeses and any additional seasonings).
6. Cover the skillet and let the dish warm through for approximately 2 minutes to melt the cheeses.
Prep and cook time: 30 minutes
